docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, KELLY ANN
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDRESEN, ROBERT COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-28-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 03 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

#3 JUDGE CHOPPELAS, MBRADY/CSR, ALEONG/CLERK - C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT; ALL PARTIES PRESENT; CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDRESEN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, KELLY ANN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, KELLY ANN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1670 MARKET STREET #25, S.F, CALIF $939.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $939.50, LEASE FORFEITED, AT 11:59PM. SEC. DEP. FORF. IF THE DEFT PAYS $ 400 ON OR BEFORE 071595 AND 081595, THEN THE JUDGMENT WILL BE DEEMED SATISFIED. DFT TO RET KEYS AND LEAVE PREMISES IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. EA. SIDE WVS CLAIMS AGAINST THE OTHER AND BEAR OWN COSTS + ATTY FEES. PROPERTY ABONDONED AFTER 071195.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT THOMAS, KELLY ANN
